Translation.Description: Rumored to be fashioned from the metal of a fallen star by the demonic blacksmiths of Tegghan-Turak, these shields were used to devastating effect during the Arcane Wars. Common soldiers would easily disrupt the onslaught of Archmages, leaving them in a stupor long enough to fall to the assault of ordinary weapons.
Translation.Provides: Scrambler Effect - Disrupts a spell an enemy unit is casting and causes them to lose their next turn unless they resist
Shield Bash - Knocks the victim back a tile
